name: TOASTED MARSHMALLOW COLD FOAM
text:

- 1 1 CBS 8.5 C water
- 1 lbs marshmallows

-20 oz water
- 1 cup BS Vanilla
COLD FOAM:1:2 Syrup:Heavy Cream+ Vanilla
